conversation.content: I'm looking for a 2-bedroom apartment in San Francisco, budget is $3000/month max. I have a cat. I work at Salesforce Tower so commute is important.
Looking for a studio or 1br in Brooklyn, ideally under $2500 but I'd go up to $2800 if it has in-unit laundry. No pets.

trade_off_rules: willing to pay up to $2800 if in-unit laundry

conversation.content: I want to find an apartment in Seattle.
Great! What's your budget and how many bedrooms do you need?
2 bedrooms, around $2200 a month. I commute to downtown Seattle and also sometimes to Bellevue.
Got it! Any lifestyle preferences — gym, parking, outdoor space?
Parking is a must. Gym would be nice but not required. I have a small dog.
I need an apartment in Austin.

Looking for 2br in Chicago's Wicker Park or Logan Square area. Max $2400/mo but I'd pay up to $2700 if I could walk to the Blue Line. I work remotely so commute doesn't matter. I value natural light and high ceilings. No smoking building. Currently have 2 cats.

trade_off_rules: willing to pay up to $2700 if walkable to Blue Line
expected_preferences.lifestyle_notes: remote worker, values natural light and high ceilings, 2 cats
